name: PW-GF-09: all T8 reinforcement (5 functional groups, see notes)
notes: PROVENANCE: PW-GF-09(R) sheet annotations, read visually from PDF and confirmed in raw DXF text: 'T8 UBAR @150 mm', 'T8 Vertical @150 mm', 'T8 Horizontal @150 mm', 'T8 Ties @100 mm', 'T8 Hook @100 mm'. Diameter 8mm is self-decoding from the mark. spacing=null because the 5 functional groups have DIFFERENT spacings (150/150/150/100/100) — one number would be wrong; per-group breakdown is in families.json. SCHEMA LIMITATION (v1): selectors cannot distinguish same-mark functional groups, so this record covers all T8 as one labeled group.

name: PW-GF-09: T10 bars
notes: PROVENANCE: 'T10@150mm' read visually from PW-GF-09(R).pdf; mark confirmed in raw DXF text (2 occurrences). Diameter self-decoding.

name: PW-GF-09: T12 bars including 2-T12 Crack Bars
notes: PROVENANCE: '1-T12', '2 -T12 -Crack Bar' in raw DXF text and PDF. spacing=null: these are count-marked bars ('1-T12', '2-T12'), not spaced bars. Same-mark schema limitation applies (main T12 vs crack-bar T12 indistinguishable by selector).

name: PW-GF-09: T16 edge bars (A17 — grouping UNRESOLVED)
notes: PROVENANCE: '2 -T16' appears 8 times in PW-GF-09(R) raw DXF text, in two sheet regions (x≈-28.7k/-27.9k and x≈-21k/-22k). Diameter self-decoding. QUANTITY UNKNOWN: whether the 8 annotations label one physical pair of T16 bars repeatedly across views, or multiple distinct 2-T16 groups, CANNOT be proven from annotations alone — this is exactly open question A17 (docs/engineering_assumptions.md). This record deliberately does NOT assert that the pipeline's accepted T16 identity is correct; the metric outcome for this record measures the pipeline against an honest 'all T16 in this drawing' grouping, pending engineer resolution.

name: PW-GF-09: N7 dowel bars (16mm × 6)
notes: PROVENANCE: Dowel Bar Schedule on PW-GF-09(M2), read visually from PDF: N7 = 16mm dia × 6 nos. Position provenance: N7 dimension-chain row on (M1). This is real steel (dowel bars), labeled from the schedule — the diameter does NOT come from the mark (N-codes are reference codes).

name: PW-GF-09: N8 dowel bars (16mm × 9)
notes: PROVENANCE: Dowel Bar Schedule on PW-GF-09(M2), read visually from PDF: N8 = 16mm dia × 9 nos.

name: PW-GF-02: all T8 reinforcement (U-bars at 3 spacings + spaced bars, see notes)
notes: PROVENANCE: PW-GF-02(R) raw DXF text: 'T8 UBAR @125 mm', 'T8 UBAR @150 mm', 'T8 UBAR @250 mm', 'T8 @150 mm', 'T8 @250 mm', '2 -T8', '3 -T8'. No PDF was available for this sheet — provenance is raw drawing text only, no visual layout confirmation. Same-mark schema limitation applies.

name: PW-GF-02: 2-T10 bars
notes: PROVENANCE: '2 -T10' in raw DXF text. Quantity per group: 2; number of groups UNKNOWN.

name: PW-GF-02: T16 bars including 2-T16 CRACK BAR
notes: PROVENANCE: '2 -T16', '2 -T16 CRACK BAR' in raw DXF text. Note this panel's crack bars are T16 where PW-GF-09's are T12 — the two panels genuinely differ.

name: SS-GF-01: T8 bars (@150 and @200 groups)
notes: PROVENANCE: 'T8 @150 mm', 'T8 @200 mm' in SS-GF-01(R) raw DXF text. Two spacing groups — spacing=null at this granularity, breakdown in families.json.

name: SS-GF-01: T10 @125 bars
notes: PROVENANCE: 'T10 @125 mm' in raw DXF text.

name: SS-GF-01: N6 upstand reference (diameter UNKNOWN)
notes: PROVENANCE: N6 appears 4x on the (M) sheet dimension chains next to real S-RBAR upstand geometry (verified visually in the Phase 12 research). diameter=null, REASON: N-codes are reference codes and NO schedule resolving SS-GF-01's N6 exists anywhere in this package (unlike PW-GF-09's dowel schedule). Whether N6 corresponds to one of the (R) sheet's T-marks is UNKNOWN — deliberately NOT asserted.

name: SS-GF-01: N7 upstand reference (diameter UNKNOWN)
notes: PROVENANCE: as gt-ss01-n6 — 4 occurrences on (M) sheet, no resolving schedule in package, cross-sheet mapping UNKNOWN.

name: SS-GF-01: N4 reference (diameter UNKNOWN; geometry entangled with fragment cluster)
notes: PROVENANCE: N4 appears 3x on (M) sheet. diameter=null, REASON: no resolving schedule. NOTE: the pipeline's N4 family carries diameter=8.0 from a Phase 8 association — that value has NO ground-truth support (flagged in docs/audits/phase12/12.1_observation_builder.md as needing tracing); this label deliberately does not confirm it.
